# Impulse - Focus Control & Distraction Blocker

> Impulse is a productivity app that helps people block distracting apps and websites to regain focus and control over their screen time. Available on iOS and as a Chrome browser extension.

## What is Impulse?

Impulse is a focus control tool that blocks distracting apps and websites during scheduled time periods or on-demand focus sessions. It helps users reduce unconscious screen time by an average of 2+ hours per day.

## Key Features

- **App & Website Blocking**: Block distracting apps and websites instantly or on a schedule.
- **Strict Mode**: Prevents users from canceling a blocking session early. Cannot be bypassed.
- **Scheduled Focus Sessions**: Automate blocking during work hours, study time, or bedtime.
- **Quick Focus**: Start an on-demand focus session with one tap.
- **Multiple Strictness Levels**: From gentle reminders to full lockdown.
- **Emergency Access**: An emergency button for when you truly need access to a blocked app.
- **Cross-Platform**: Available on iOS (native app) and Chrome/Safari (browser extension).
- **Usage Statistics**: Track daily screen time and see detailed usage stats.
- **Blocklists**: Create and manage custom lists of apps/websites to block.

## Platforms

- **iOS App**: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/impulse-focus-control-blocker/id6736623036
- **Chrome Extension**: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/impulse-focus-control-and/ihhgdadeplnooijnccogligfccjpahik

## Pricing

Free to download and use. Premium features available via subscription.
